title: Serve `/chat` exposes explicit local error contracts
description: Black-box smoke for the missing-prompt and malformed-JSON error paths on `POST /chat`.
input: Start `armature serve`, POST an empty JSON body and a malformed JSON body to `/chat`, and verify the status/error payloads remain explicit.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_HOME=$(mktemp -d); trap "rm -rf $TMP_HOME; kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; PORT=$(node -e '"'"'const net=require("node:net"); const s=net.createServer(); s.listen(0,"127.0.0.1",()=>{console.log(s.address().port); s.close();});'"'"'); env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_HOME" ARMATURE_HOME="$TMP_HOME/.armature" ARMATURE_PROVIDER=openai OPENAI_API_KEY=test-openai-key node dist/bin/armature.js serve --port "$PORT" > "$TMP_HOME/serve.out" 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; bash agent-eval/scripts/wait-for-http.sh "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/health" "^(200)$" 50 0.1 >/dev/null; MISSING_BODY="$TMP_HOME/missing.json"; MISSING_STATUS=$(curl -s -o "$MISSING_BODY" -w "%{http_code}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{}" "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/chat"); MALFORMED_BODY="$TMP_HOME/malformed.json"; MALFORMED_STATUS=$(curl -s -o "$MALFORMED_BODY" -w "%{http_code}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary "{ invalid json" "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/chat"); printf "missing-status=%s
" "$MISSING_STATUS"; printf "missing-body=%s
" "$(cat "$MISSING_BODY")"; printf "malformed-status=%s
" "$MALFORMED_STATUS"; printf "malformed-body=%s
" "$(cat "$MALFORMED_BODY")"'
